allowed_methods: Independent group comparisons (e.g., test differences between groups)
Linear Mixed-Effects Models (LMM) / Hierarchical Linear Modeling (HLM)
forbidden_methods: Standard OLS Linear Regression (ignoring nested structure)
methodological_warnings: CRITICAL: The target outcome is binary (0/1). OLS Linear Regression is FORBIDDEN. Use Logistic Regression.
CRITICAL: Data has hierarchical/nested structure. Observations are NOT independent. Use Mixed-Effects models.
